code:
stateDiagram-v2
    direction TB

    %% ============================================================
    %% 1. 초기화 및 게스트 세션 (Guest Session)
    %% ============================================================
    state "Guest Session (Unauthenticated)" as Guest {
        direction LR
        [*] --> AppInit : URL Access
        
        state "App Initialization" as AppInit
        note right of AppInit
            AuthProvider checks localStorage
            Sets 'isLoggedIn = false'
            Sets BG color (Slate)
        end note

        state "Landing Page" as Landing
        state "Login Screen" as Login
        state "Sign Up Screen" as SignUp

        AppInit --> Landing : Render Home
        Landing --> Login : Click 'Login'
        Landing --> SignUp : Click 'Sign Up'
        
        state "Registration Processing" as RegProcess
        note right of RegProcess
            Verify Turnstile
            Check Duplicate
            Hash Password
        end note
        
        SignUp --> RegProcess : Submit Form
        RegProcess --> Login : Success (Redirect)
        RegProcess --> SignUp : Fail (Show Error)

        state "Auth Processing" as AuthProcess
        note right of AuthProcess
            Verify Turnstile
            Verify Password
            Get AccessToken
        end note

        Login --> AuthProcess : Submit Credentials
        AuthProcess --> Login : Fail (Show Error)
    }

    %% ============================================================
    %% 2. 유저 세션 (Authenticated Session)
    %% ============================================================
    state "User Session (Authenticated)" as User {
        direction TB
        
        state "Auth Success" as AuthSuccess
        note right of AuthSuccess
            Set 'isLoggedIn = true'
            Set BG color (Amber)
            Save Token to LocalStorage
        end note

        state "Main Dashboard" as Dashboard
        state "Board View (Category)" as BoardList
        state "User Profile View" as Profile

        %% --- Post Creation Flow ---
        state "Post Creation View" as PostCreate
        state "AI Generating Content" as AI_Gen_Post
        note right of AI_Gen_Post
            Call OpenAI API
            Generate Text
        end note

        state "Saving Post" as DB_Save_Post

        %% --- Post Detail & Interaction Flow ---
        state "Post Detail View" as PostDetail
        state "Reaction Processing" as Reacting
        note right of Reacting
            RPC Call (Toggle)
            Create Notification
        end note

        state "Comment Processing" as Commenting
        note right of Commenting
            AI Generate Comment
            Insert DB
        end note

        %% --- Post Edit Flow ---
        state "Post Edit View" as PostEdit
        state "AI Rewriting Content" as AI_Edit_Post
        note right of AI_Edit_Post
            Call OpenAI API
            Rewrite Text
        end note

        state "Updating Post" as DB_Update_Post

        %% --- Account Management ---
        state "Profile Updating" as ProfileUpdate
        state "Account Deleting" as AccDelete
        note right of AccDelete
            Cascade Delete All Data
            (Posts, Comments, Noti, etc.)
        end note

        %% Transitions inside User Session
        AuthSuccess --> Dashboard : Redirect
        Dashboard --> BoardList : Click Category
        Dashboard --> PostCreate : Click Write
        Dashboard --> PostDetail : Click Post Title
        Dashboard --> Profile : Click My Page

        %% Create Post
        PostCreate --> AI_Gen_Post : Submit Prompt
        AI_Gen_Post --> DB_Save_Post : Success
        DB_Save_Post --> PostDetail : Redirect

        %% View & Interact
        PostDetail --> Reacting : Click Like/Dislike
        Reacting --> PostDetail : Update Counts
        PostDetail --> Commenting : Write Comment
        Commenting --> PostDetail : Update List
        PostDetail --> PostEdit : Click Edit (Author Only)
        PostDetail --> Dashboard : Click Delete (Soft Delete)

        %% Edit Post
        PostEdit --> AI_Edit_Post : Submit New Prompt
        AI_Edit_Post --> DB_Update_Post : Success
        DB_Update_Post --> PostDetail : Redirect

        %% Profile
        Profile --> ProfileUpdate : Update Info
        ProfileUpdate --> Profile : Success
        Profile --> AccDelete : Click Withdrawal
    }

    %% ============================================================
    %% 3. Global Transitions (세션 간 전환)
    %% ============================================================
    
    AuthProcess --> AuthSuccess : Success
    
    %% Logout
    Dashboard --> Guest : Click Logout (Clear Storage)
    Profile --> Guest : Click Logout
    
    %% Account Withdrawal
    AccDelete --> Guest : Success (Clear Storage)

    %% Protected Route Redirect
    Guest --> Login : Try Accessing Protected Route
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个社区论坛应用的状态图，核心是区分游客状态和登录用户状态，整个流程从打开URL开始。
明白，游客状态是未认证的起点。AppInit这里需要做哪些初始化操作？
AppInit要检查localStorage，设置isLoggedIn为false，背景色用Slate灰。然后渲染到Landing首页。
好的，我把Guest Session作为外层状态，里面包含AppInit和Landing，用LR方向布局。
Landing页要有两个出口：点击Login去登录页，点击Sign Up去注册页。
登录和注册都作为Guest Session内部的独立状态，对吗？
对。注册提交后先进RegProcess，要验证Turnstile、查重、密码哈希，成功跳Login，失败回SignUp。
RegProcess加进去了，旁边附上验证流程的注释。登录那边也需要类似的处理节点吗？
是的，Login提交后进入AuthProcess，验证Turnstile、密码，获取AccessToken，失败回Login。
AuthProcess成功之后直接到User Session吗？中间有没有过渡状态？
加一个AuthSuccess作为过渡，设置isLoggedIn为true，背景色变Amber，Token存localStorage。
User Session用TB方向，内部先放AuthSuccess，然后连到Dashboard主面板。
Dashboard是核心枢纽，有四个出口：点分类进BoardList，点写文章进PostCreate，点帖子标题进PostDetail，点我的页面进Profile。
PostCreate是发帖流程的起点，需要AI辅助生成内容吗？
对，PostCreate提交Prompt后进入AI_Gen_Post，调OpenAI API生成文本，成功后再DB_Save_Post保存，最后重定向到PostDetail。
AI生成和数据库保存都加上了，AI_Gen_Post旁边注明调用OpenAI API。
PostDetail是帖子详情页，要有互动功能：点赞/点踩进Reacting，写评论进Commenting。
Reacting和Commenting处理完都回到PostDetail更新界面吗？
没错。Reacting用RPC调用Toggle，还要创建通知；Commenting可以AI生成评论然后插入数据库。
两个处理节点都加了注释，Reacting更新计数后返回，Commenting更新列表后返回。
PostDetail还要能编辑和删除。编辑按钮只有作者能看到，点击进PostEdit；删除是软删除，回Dashboard。
编辑流程也走AI辅助吗？和发帖类似？
对，PostEdit提交新Prompt到AI_Edit_Post，调API重写内容，成功进DB_Update_Post，最后回PostDetail。
编辑流程完整了。Profile页面需要哪些功能？
Profile可以更新信息到ProfileUpdate，成功返回；还有账户注销AccDelete，要级联删除所有数据。
级联删除包括帖子、评论、通知这些吗？
是的，Posts、Comments、Notifications等全部清理。AccDelete成功后就回到Guest Session。
AccDelete的注释和退出到Guest的连线都加上了。现在处理全局的会话切换吧？
需要三条全局路径：AuthProcess成功到AuthSuccess；Dashboard和Profile都能点Logout回Guest，要Clear Storage；还有游客试图访问受保护路由时重定向到Login。
Logout在Dashboard和Profile都有入口，统一清理存储后回到Guest。受保护路由的拦截也加上。
等等，我刚才发现AuthProcess到AuthSuccess的连线画在Guest外面了，但AuthSuccess是在User Session内部的，这样跨边界对吗？
对，这是故意的，AuthProcess在Guest内部，AuthSuccess在User内部，这条线表示会话切换的边界跨越。
明白了，保持这条跨边界连线。让我再检查一下Guest Session内部的LR布局是否清晰。
User Session里面状态比较多，TB方向会不会太挤？特别是PostCreate、PostDetail、PostEdit这些流程分支。
我在注释里分组标记了：Create Flow、View & Interact、Edit Flow，视觉上应该能区分开。需要调整布局方向吗？
TB可以，只要注释清楚就行。再确认一下AppInit的初始状态标记，用[*]表示起始点。
[*]到AppInit的URL Access连线有了。整个图的方向是TB，Guest和User两大块上下分布。
BoardList目前只有从Dashboard进入，没有到其他状态的连线，这是对的吗？
BoardList作为纯浏览视图，点击帖子标题应该能进PostDetail，我补一条线？
好，加上BoardList到PostDetail的连线，点击帖子标题进入详情。这样所有流程都闭环了。

已添加。最终检查：Guest Session包含AppInit、Landing、Login、SignUp、RegProcess、AuthProcess；User Session包含AuthSuccess、Dashboard、BoardList、Profile、PostCreate、AI_Gen_Post、DB_Save_Post、PostDetail、Reacting、Commenting、PostEdit、AI_Edit_Post、DB_Update_Post、ProfileUpdate、AccDelete；全局切换线四条。
完整了。颜色方案也确认：Guest用Slate，User用Amber，视觉上区分认证状态。
